info.title: Rice Shower (LT Capstone)
info.description: API Web Server that scrape Lakeshore Metrics and save it to time-series database, then allow user to query the data.

tags.name: Query
tags.description: Endpoints for querying collected data from time-series database

tags.name: Scrape
tags.description: Endpoints for getting metrics/status from the scraper

tags.name: Experiments
tags.description: Endpoints for managing PID experiments (named runs with snapshots)

get.description: Query thermometer metrics data from time series database

schema.description: List of channel numbers to retrieve
Start time for the query in ISO format

anyOf.description: Start time for the query in ISO format

schema.description: End time for the query in ISO format

anyOf.description: End time for the query in ISO format

schema.description: Interval in seconds for time bucketing

dataPoints.description: Total number of data points returned

get.description: Query heater metrics data from time series database

schema.description: List of heater channel numbers to retrieve
Start time for the query in ISO format

anyOf.description: Start time for the query in ISO format

schema.description: End time for the query in ISO format

anyOf.description: End time for the query in ISO format

schema.description: Interval in seconds for time bucketing

dataPoints.description: Total number of data points returned

powerPercent.description: Requested power as a percentage (0-100). Reflects PID output or manual setting.

get.description: Retrieve scraping metrics for all active systems, including per-system error counts and success totals

anyOf.description: Timestamp of the last error, or null if no errors have occurred

count.description: Number of errors for this channel/pin

anyOf.description: Timestamp of the last error, or null if no errors have occurred

count.description: Number of errors for this channel/pin

get.description: Retrieve scraping metrics for a specific system by its ID

anyOf.description: Timestamp of the last error, or null if no errors have occurred

count.description: Number of errors for this channel/pin

anyOf.description: Timestamp of the last error, or null if no errors have occurred

count.description: Number of errors for this channel/pin

get.description: Retrieve windowed scrape status (success/error counts in last 1m, 10m, and since start) for all active systems

successLast1M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 1 minute

successLast10M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 10 minutes

successTotal.description: Total number of successful scrapes since service start

errorsLast1M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 1 minute

errorsLast10M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 10 minutes

errorsTotal.description: Total number of failed scrapes since service start

anyOf.description: Timestamp of the last error, or null if none
Message of the last error, or null if none

errorCountPerChannel.description: Mapping of channel number to cumulative error count for that channel

successLast1M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 1 minute

successLast10M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 10 minutes

successTotal.description: Total number of successful scrapes since service start

errorsLast1M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 1 minute

errorsLast10M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 10 minutes

errorsTotal.description: Total number of failed scrapes since service start

anyOf.description: Timestamp of the last error, or null if none
Message of the last error, or null if none

errorCountPerChannel.description: Mapping of channel number to cumulative error count for that channel

startedAt.description: UTC timestamp when this scraper was started

get.description: Retrieve windowed scrape status for a specific system by its ID

successLast1M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 1 minute

successLast10M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 10 minutes

successTotal.description: Total number of successful scrapes since service start

errorsLast1M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 1 minute

errorsLast10M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 10 minutes

errorsTotal.description: Total number of failed scrapes since service start

anyOf.description: Timestamp of the last error, or null if none
Message of the last error, or null if none

errorCountPerChannel.description: Mapping of channel number to cumulative error count for that channel

successLast1M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 1 minute

successLast10M.description: Number of successful scrapes in the last 10 minutes

successTotal.description: Total number of successful scrapes since service start

errorsLast1M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 1 minute

errorsLast10M.description: Number of failed scrapes in the last 10 minutes

errorsTotal.description: Total number of failed scrapes since service start

get.description: List all registered systems with their thermometers and heaters

post.description: Register a new system with thermometers and heaters

get.description: Get a single system by ID with its thermometers and heaters

put.description: Update an existing system. Thermos/heaters are replaced if provided.

delete.description: Delete a system and all its associated thermometers and heaters

get.description: List experiments with optional filters by system, channel, status, name, and start-time range. Sorted by startedAt desc.

anyOf.description: When the experiment ended; null while running

post.description: Create an experiment and start the PID loop. Captures setpoint and Kp/Ki/Kd as the experiment's start snapshot. Refuses if PID is already active or another experiment is running on the same channel.

anyOf.description: When the experiment ended; null while running

get.description: Return the currently running experiment for a given (systemId, channel), or null if none.

anyOf.description: When the experiment ended; null while running

get.description: Get a single experiment by id.

anyOf.description: When the experiment ended; null while running

patch.description: Update an experiment's name or notes (no other fields).

anyOf.description: When the experiment ended; null while running

delete.description: Delete a non-running experiment. Refuses to delete a running one.

post.description: Stop a running experiment. Calls the heater PID stop endpoint and finalizes the experiment row.

anyOf.description: When the experiment ended; null while running
